Q2070821.description: Divided diagonally into three sections by two parallel lines: upper hoist blue (small triangle), white middle band, lower fly yellow (small triangle). A yellow sun with rays sits centered on the white band.

Q2073258.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow over red.

Q2084156.description: A dark red field with a horizontal black stripe near the top and bottom. Centered is an oval emblem with a light blue interior bearing a white six-pointed star with a small sun face inside, surrounded by a yellow border with small yellow seven-pointed stars.

Q2086033.description: A red field bearing two crossed white anchors (a sea anchor and a river anchor) centered, with a yellow scepter topped by the imperial double-headed eagle of Russia rising vertically through the cross of the anchors.

Q2100376.description: A yellow field crossed diagonally from upper hoist to lower fly by two parallel bands — a red band over a black band. Centered on the bands is a nine-pointed yellow star.

Q2132438.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with a red square in the upper hoist bearing a small white cross extending to its edges.

Q2133401.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white (top), blue, and yellow, with a red crowned lion rampant facing the hoist centered (overlapping all three bands).

Q2134803.description: Thirteen alternating horizontal stripes of black and white, with a red canton in the upper hoist bearing a white disc with a blue silhouette of Brazil, flanked by four yellow five-pointed stars (one in each corner of the canton).

Q2137315.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow over red.

Q2151681.description: Divided by a wavy white horizontal band into a blue upper section (with a diagonal triangle from upper hoist) and a green lower triangle, with a red horizontal stripe near the bottom. A large yellow five-pointed star is centered.

Q2156111.description: A white field bearing the San Luis coat of arms centered: a green laurel wreath surrounding an oval scene of red mountains under a yellow sun with a blue sky, with two deer on a green plain below.

Q2157375.description: A light blue field with a large white triangle pointing downward from the top edge to the bottom center. A row of green chevrons spans horizontally across the middle. In the upper white triangle sits a ring of seven yellow four-pointed stars (the Southern Cross constellation).

Q2169543.description: A field bordered with a decorative copper and gold pattern, bearing a central panel with a winged golden lion of Saint Mark (gold body, white wings, halo) on a dark blue ground holding an open book. A vertical column of seven small coats of arms (one for each Venetian province) runs along the fly.

Q2171778.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow (top) and blue.

Q2191442.description: Five horizontal bands of red, white, red, white, red, with a large green diamond centered (overlapping all five bands) bearing the state coat of arms (a white five-pointed star with an eagle and key emblem, surrounded by wheat, foliage, and a red banner reading "ESTADO DE STA CATARINA").

Q2195846.description: A black field bearing a centered gold (yellow) lion rampant with red claws and tongue, holding a small shield with the red and white striped flag of Austria across its chest.

Q2225406.description: A blue field with a yellow border, bearing the white-robed figure of the Archangel Michael holding a flaming sword and a shield with a gold cross, centered.

Q2241052.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and light blue, with the Mendoza coat of arms centered: an oval cartouche showing two clasped hands holding a pike topped with a red Phrygian cap, framed by a green laurel wreath, with the Andes mountain peaks and a golden sunburst above.

Q2244549.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), white, and light blue, with the Santa Fe provincial coat of arms centered on the white band (a yellow oval bearing crossed arrows and an axe, encircled by black text reading "PROVINCIA INVENCIBLE DE SANTA FE").

Q2250163.description: A checkerboard pattern of red and white squares (six columns by four rows).

Q2263781.description: Quartered: upper hoist and lower fly yellow bearing a black lion rampant; upper fly and lower hoist yellow bearing a red lion rampant.

Q2264438.description: A white field bearing a black silhouette of a Moor's head in profile facing the hoist, wearing a white headband (the Moor of Corsica).

Q2265085.description: A white field with a horizontal red stripe along the top and bottom. Centered between them, six red five-pointed stars (three to each side) flank a black tower silhouette.

Q2271903.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red (top), blue, and white.

Q2283932.description: Four equal horizontal bands of white (top), red, white, and red, with a blue square in the upper hoist (the height of two stripes) bearing a white isosceles triangle pointing upward.

Q2284326.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and green.

Q2314559.description: A light blue field with a white horizontal band centered (with a triangular cutout at the hoist pointing into the band). Black letters "PATRIA - LIBERTAD" appear on the left and "CONSTITUCIÓN" on the right of the band, with the Argentine coat of arms centered.

Q2323754.description: A white field bearing a red saltire formed of two diagonal raguly (jagged-edged) bands resembling crossed pruned tree branches (the Cross of Burgundy).

Q2329426.description: A white field bearing a centered green square with four yellow arrows pointing outward from a small green diamond at the center (forming a compass-rose / cross pattern).

Q2330297.description: Five horizontal bands: red (narrow top), yellow, blue wavy band (middle), yellow, red (narrow bottom).

Q2340565.description: Three equal vertical bands of light blue (hoist), red, and light blue, with a yellow sun bearing a vertical red cross centered on the red band, with two narrow black horizontal stripes (one near top, one near bottom) running across all three bands.

Q2345639.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white.

Q2361008.description: A solid dark blue field with a single large white five-pointed star centered.

Q2361840.description: A blue field bearing the Union Flag (without the saltire of Saint Patrick): a white Saint Andrew's saltire overlaid by a red Saint George's cross fimbriated in white.

Q2364473.description: A magenta (pink-red) field bearing a stylized yellow Cantabrian Labarum centered: four curved arches arranged in a cross-like pattern with circular nodes at each end and a small central disc.

Q2372702.description: Two equal horizontal bands of green (top) and green separated by a thin white stripe, with the Chernihiv coat of arms in the upper hoist canton (a black double-headed eagle holding a blue shield bearing a yellow trident, surmounted by three small crowns).

Q2376574.description: Three horizontal bands of white (top), red, and white (the red band roughly equal in width to the upper white band).

Q2387656.description: Two horizontal bands of blue (top, double width) and red, with a yellow arched silhouette of the aurora borealis spanning the blue band.

Q2387786.description: Quartered: upper hoist and lower fly are blue with three yellow fleurs-de-lis (two over one); upper fly and lower hoist are bendy blue and yellow (alternating diagonal stripes). The entire flag is bordered by a checked pattern of red and white.

Q2400978.description: Four horizontal bands of light blue (top), white, light blue, white (alternating) with a wide red diagonal band running from the upper hoist to the lower fly.

Q2403145.description: Two equal horizontal bands of light blue (top) and green, separated by a thin red line, with a centered emblem of a yellow sun (with a red bottom half) inside a blue gear, surrounded by a green laurel wreath.

Q2424575.description: Three equal vertical bands of yellow (hoist), red, and yellow, with a yellow throne and gold cushion bearing a black crown centered on the red band.

Q2452642.description: A blue field semé (strewn) with small yellow rectangular billets, bearing a centered crowned gold lion rampant facing the hoist with red claws and tongue.

Q2474848.description: A blue field bearing a stylized white-edged grey iris flower centered, with two yellow petals at the base.

Q2478084.description: Three equal horizontal bands of light blue (top), white, and light blue, with the Argentine national coat of arms centered on the white band (an oval with clasped hands holding a pike topped with a red Phrygian cap on a sky-blue ground, surrounded by green laurel and a golden sunburst above). Black text reading "EN UNION Y LIBERTAD" arches below.

Q2499570.description: A blue field bearing a central figure of the Virgin Mary in red and dark blue robes, standing on a white cloud, flanked by four kneeling angels in white robes with halos and outstretched wings.

Q2508330.description: A triangular saffron (or navy blue) flag bearing a black Khanda emblem (a double-edged sword between two curved kirpans circling a chakkar) centered. A tassel hangs from the fly point.

Q2509336.description: Thirteen alternating horizontal stripes of red and white (seven red, six white), with the British Union Jack (without the red saltire of Saint Patrick) in the upper hoist canton.

Q2516219.description: A yellow field bearing a red Burgundy saltire centered — a diagonal X-shape with jagged, ragged edges resembling pruned tree branches. Centered over the saltire, a gold ducal crown set with green and red gemstones.

Q2533519.description: A horizontal bicolor of red over white bearing a small shield at the center: the shield shows a black ecclesiastical banner with three tassels on a white field.

Q2540917.description: A white field bearing a centered red Belgian lion rampant, encircled by nine small blue flower-shaped pentagonal devices arranged in a circle around it.

Q2578041.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow (top) and red, with the Bogotá coat of arms centered: a blue shield bordered with gold heraldic ornaments bearing a black eagle holding a red pomegranate, surmounted by a small gold crown.

Q2584616.description: A field of alternating white and blue wavy horizontal bands, with the Zeeland coat of arms centered: a yellow shield bearing a red lion rising from blue and white waves, surmounted by a crowned crest.

Q2586101.description: A white field divided by a green Nordic-style cross (shifted toward the hoist), with the upper hoist quarter red, upper fly blue, lower hoist blue, and lower fly red.

Q2586114.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), yellow, and black.

Q2600445.description: Three equal horizontal bands of white, yellow, and black.

Q2616924.description: Three equal horizontal bands of yellow (top), red, and blue.

Q2616930.description: A yellow field bearing a red lion rampant outlined in black, facing the hoist.

Q2620742.description: A dark red field bearing the Bryansk Oblast coat of arms centered: a blue shield bearing a yellow fir tree above a yellow plow and red bar, surmounted by a gold crown and framed by red-yellow-green ribbon bows.

Q2621952.description: Two equal vertical bands of white (hoist, wide) and red (narrow), with the Vologda coat of arms in the upper hoist (a red shield bearing a hand holding a sword and orb, surmounted by a crown).

Q2633866.description: Two horizontal bands: light blue above, dark blue and white wavy stripes below representing the sea. Centered over the horizon is a stylized scene of a snow-capped brown mountain backed by a yellow rising sun with rays; four small white five-pointed stars sit in the upper sky beside the mountain.

Q2635320.description: Three horizontal bands: red (top), yellow (narrow center stripe), red below. A white camel with a yellow saddle stands centered on the flag, straddling all three bands.

Q2635524.description: A solid teal-blue field bearing a stylized white outline map of Sakhalin Island (vertical, at the hoist) and the Kuril Islands (chain extending to the fly).

Q2635764.description: A white field bearing a light blue saltire (diagonal cross from corner to corner); centered over the saltire, the Arkhangelsk coat of arms — a small shield ensigned by an imperial crown and wreathed by golden oak leaves, the shield itself depicting the Archangel Michael.

Q2660409.description: A blue field bearing a centered yellow sun in the Vergina Star style — sixteen sharp triangular rays radiating from a central disc.

Q2661050.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white.

Q2668687.description: A red field with a large white circle at the hoist containing a stylized white letter C; a white cowboy hat sits inside the open side of the C.

Q2682051.description: An oval coat of arms framed by a green laurel wreath: a blue upper field with a red Phrygian cap on a gold staff, a white lower field with two clasped hands of different skin tones, and a radiant golden sun face crowning the top.

Q2706970.description: Three equal vertical bands of green (hoist), white, and light blue. On the white band a brown plow is centered within a ring of yellow five-pointed stars, with a small yellow sunburst above.

Q2709096.description: A dark green field with a large golden Celtic harp centered.

Q2727336.description: A yellow field bearing a red rampant lion centered within a red double-line rectangular border (tressure) decorated with red fleurs-de-lis at the corners and along the sides.

Q2750384.description: A blue field bearing a large white five-pointed star centered, with the gold-bordered city seal in the middle of the star.

Q2772636.description: A light blue field with white zigzag lines along the top edge (mountains) and white wavy lines along the bottom edge (waves). Centered, a dark blue cogwheel containing a stylized white sluice gate and a vertical yellow wheat sheaf, with a yellow sun rising behind.

Q2777623.description: A blue field at the hoist and a green field in the fly, with a stylized white "O" (Ottawa monogram) overlapping the boundary between the two colors.

Q2790848.description: A swallow-tail flag, hoist half a red rectangle bearing a white eagle with crown and wings spread; fly half white with a swallow-tail cut.

Q2797535.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with the Tyrolean coat of arms centered over both bands — a white shield bearing a red eagle with golden talons and a stylized crown-like crest on its head.

Q2875801.description: Three equal vertical bands of dark red (hoist), white, and light blue, with a brown sun centered on the white band (a face surrounded by wavy and straight rays).

Q2897956.description: Three equal vertical bands of blue (hoist), white, and red, with a small yellow five-pointed star in the upper portion of the blue band.

Q2899775.description: A light blue field with the British Union Jack in the canton at the upper hoist. A dark blue Scandinavian-style cross divides the field. In the fly quarter, the five white stars of the Southern Cross constellation; in the lower hoist quarter, a single seven-pointed white Commonwealth star.

Q2902319.description: A blue field with a central white rectangle (panel) bearing the City of Edmonton coat of arms — a shield with a sunburst, river bend, and crown — above the text "THE CITY OF EDMONTON". A purple banner across the shield reads "INDUSTRY · INTEGRITY · PROGRESS".

Q2914899.description: A light blue field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and the RAF roundel (concentric circles of dark blue, white, and red) in the fly.

Q2915836.description: A white field bearing a blue Greek cross extending to the edges, with gold borders and seven-pointed gold stars in each quarter, and a red square at the center bearing a white emblem.

Q2917560.description: A white field bordered in gold, bearing a centered brown phoenix rising from a red flaming crown, with a white banner below reading "ORO EN PAZ FIERRO EN GUERRA" and "SAN FRANCISCO" in blue letters along the bottom.

Q2919871.description: Divided diagonally by a curved white band sweeping from upper hoist to lower fly: upper-hoist triangle blue, lower-fly triangle yellow. Centered on the white band, a circular medallion containing the Winnipeg coat of arms (white flower, brown castle gate, blue scroll reading "UNUM CUM VIRTUTE MULTORUM") within a blue ring labeled "CITY OF WINNIPEG".

Q2963124.description: A field divided into a rayonné pattern of alternating blue and yellow triangular rays radiating from the center, with a red escutcheon (small shield) centered.

Q2993812.description: A solid red field bearing the Krasnoyarsk Krai coat of arms centered — a small shield with a rampant golden lion holding a shovel and sickle, surmounted by a golden crown and wreathed in golden oak and cedar branches with a blue ribbon.

Q3038991.description: A blue field divided by a white cross (vertical and horizontal bands) with a red disc centered at the intersection bearing a white five-pointed star.

Q3038998.description: A field divided into vertical stripes of yellow and black in alternating jagged shapes (Maryland-style Calvert quartering), with a black-bordered yellow shield centered containing the gray Battle Monument of Baltimore.

Q3039014.description: A blue field with two large red triangles (mountains) rising from the lower edge, edged in white. Above the mountains, a yellow disc (sun) on the blue sky.

Q3039030.description: A royal blue pennant on a white field or background with a white circle on a blue pennant divided by four parts; each of the four parts of the circle containing a blue symbol, a building; a cogged wheel and steel square; a ship's wheel; a microscope.

Q3039032.description: A light blue field bearing a centered emblem of a gear, ship, factory, and city skyline with industry symbols. "MILWAUKEE" appears in red letters across the bottom; "1846" appears in yellow on the right.

Q3039042.description: A white field with a light blue saltire (X-shape) extending to the corners, bearing the Rio de Janeiro city coat of arms centered: a red shield with crossed arrows and a globe, surmounted by a red mural crown and flanked by two green dolphins.

Q3039050.description: A red field bearing a white ermine (small mammal) walking toward the hoist with a scarf decorated with black ermine spots flowing from its collar back toward the fly.

Q3039080.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), white, and red.

Q3039109.description: A red field bearing two gold lions stacked one above the other, both facing the hoist, with blue claws and tongues.

Q3173323.description: A blue field bearing a red Saint George's cross (vertical and horizontal red bands) fimbriated in white, overlaid on a white saltire (combined with a red saltire of Saint Patrick, both fimbriated).

Q3263233.description: A diagonal tricolor divided from upper hoist to lower fly: a red triangle in the upper hoist, a white diagonal band across the middle, and a black triangle in the lower fly.

Q3314598.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red, yellow, and purple, with the coat of arms of the Spanish Republic centered on the yellow band (a quartered shield supported by two columns with crown above).

Q3352503.description: Quartered: upper hoist and lower fly are white with a red cross of Saint George; upper fly and lower hoist are paly of yellow and red (alternating vertical yellow and red stripes — the Senyera).

Q3434487.description: A blue field above a red field divided by white wavy lines, charged with a large white castle on the upper half and a gold sailing ship on the red waves below.

Q3442757.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red, white, and blue, with the coat of arms of Herzeg-Bosnia centered on the white band — a small red-and-white checked shield bordered in gold, ensigned by a gold crown.

Q3447158.description: Three equal vertical stripes of red, white, and blue. Centered on the white stripe, a red-bordered white shield reading "CLEVELAND" above the year "1796" in a wreath, with the motto "PROGRESS & PROSPERITY" on a banner below.

Q3500259.description: Seven equal horizontal bands of the rainbow — red, orange, yellow, green, light blue, blue, and purple — bearing a centered gold Inca sun disc with an anthropomorphic face.

Q3633924.description: A heraldic shield bendy of red and white — four diagonal stripes running from upper-left to lower-right, alternating red and white.

Q3633963.description: A white field bearing a red Saint George's cross (vertical and horizontal red bands) extending to the edges.

Q3744856.description: A green field with a green vertical stripe at the hoist bearing a yellow upright spear flanked by two yellow swords; the fly extends as two white triangular tongues (pennant tips) edged in green.

Q3973024.description: An oval coat of arms on a blue field with a gold Gothic letter A and a red walking elephant beneath it; the oval is framed by an ornate silver scroll cartouche topped with a gold crown, with a red ribbon below carrying the letters S.P.Q.C.

Q3979151.description: Fifteen alternating red and white horizontal stripes (eight red, seven white) with a blue canton at the hoist bearing fifteen white five-pointed stars in five rows.

Q4485668.description: Two horizontal bands, red (top, larger) and green (bottom). Centered straddling the divide, a yellow naval cannon on a wheeled wooden carriage facing the hoist, flanked by two stacked pyramids of black cannonballs.

Q4486181.description: A blue field bearing the Zagreb coat of arms centered: a blue shield bordered in yellow showing a white three-towered castle, a yellow six-pointed star in the upper hoist, and a white crescent in the upper fly.

Q4486440.description: A red field bearing a white emblem centered: a horizontal crescent supporting a five-pointed star flanked by two crossed kris (wavy daggers) and two upright spears.

Q4486662.description: Divided by a centered yellow cross extending to the edges, with the upper hoist quarter red, upper fly blue, lower hoist blue, lower fly red. A red Krasnoyarsk shield with a yellow rampant lion holding tools is centered on the cross, topped by a yellow mural crown.

Q4486900.description: A red field with a gold heraldic emblem at the upper hoist: a wreath of grain encircling a small shield (yellow with red horizontal stripes); above the shield, a green crescent.

Q4487042.description: A light blue field with a stylized yellow ancient sailing ship (with red and green sails) centered above a white wavy band along the lower edge representing water.

Q4487085.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red over white, with a blue canton at the upper hoist bearing a yellow crescent and a yellow five-pointed star.

Q4487278.description: Three equal vertical stripes of red, white, and yellow, with the Odesa coat of arms centered on the white stripe — a red shield bearing a white anchor, ensigned with a silver mural crown and bordered by an orange decorative frame.

Q4487351.description: A green field with a white saltire (X-shaped cross) extending corner to corner, dividing the field into four green triangles.

Q4487410.description: A yellow field with a black right triangle in the upper hoist quarter, edged along its hypotenuse by a red triangle.

Q4487474.description: Three equal vertical stripes of blue, white, and yellow; centered on the white stripe is a green coconut palm tree growing from a small green hillock.

Q4487638.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue over white, with the city coat of arms centered: two gold lions flanking a red shield bearing a white castle with crossed keys.

Q4487718.description: A light blue field bearing a yellow-bordered shield with a white castle topped by two green peaks above a blue river, centered.

Q4487879.description: A green field with a vertical blue stripe down the center. Over the stripe, a yellow falcon stands with wings spread atop a horizontal scroll of white paper or fabric.

Q4488105.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and black.

Q4488234.description: A yellow field with a horizontal white wall of crenellated bricks across the upper portion (with rounded battlements). A yellow Bactrian camel with a yellow saddle stands centered on the wall; the field below the wall is green.

Q4488270.description: A solid green field with the city coat of arms centered: a green shield bordered yellow containing a yellow cornucopia spilling fruit and flowers, with a caduceus (winged staff with two serpents) crossed behind it.

Q4490372.description: A red field with a wide yellow horizontal stripe across the center. A white camel with a yellow saddle stands centered on the flag, straddling all three areas.

Q4490389.description: A white field bordered top and bottom by horizontal yellow stripes. Centered, a black double-headed eagle with a small red shield on its chest, a yellow scepter, and a yellow crown above.

Q4696942.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green, white, and green.

Q4784194.description: A complex swallowtail flag with red, white, yellow, and blue stripes radiating from a central seal, with a green chevron at the fly bearing a white star.

Q4876605.description: 7 equal horizontal stripes with bark brown and the top, white in the middle, and black on the bottom. The other stripes have colors in between. Abear paw silhouette covers the upper left quadrant.

Q4889892.description: Thirteen alternating horizontal stripes of red and white (seven red, six white), with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing thirteen white seven-pointed stars arranged in an arc around the large white numerals "76".

Q4898324.description: Thirteen alternating horizontal stripes of red and white (seven red, six white), with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing thirteen white five-pointed stars arranged in a circle.

Q5179800.description: Thirteen alternating red and white horizontal stripes with a blue canton at the hoist bearing thirteen white five-pointed stars arranged in a circle around a central star.

Q5456645.description: A black field with a white crescent enclosing a white five-pointed star, centered.

Q5456674.description: Divided into three triangular fields meeting at center: white (hoist) bearing a yellow five-pointed star, dark blue (upper fly) bearing three white fleurs-de-lis, and red (lower fly) bearing a yellow castle.

Q5456699.description: A red field with the city coat of arms in the hoist (a shield divided into a blue field with a white fleur-de-lis and a white field with a castle, beneath a Union Jack chief), and "Baton Rouge" in large flowing white script across the fly.

Q5456702.description: A red field with a blue and yellow zigzag chevron at the hoist, charged with a yellow bull’s head facing the viewer in the center.

Q5456706.description: Three equal vertical stripes of blue, white, and red. Centered on the white stripe, a shield containing three green hills with a yellow star above, crossed by gold swords.

Q5456707.description: A light blue field bearing the city seal centered: a white roundel with gold border showing a panoramic view of Boston and the text "BOSTONIA CONDITA AD 1630".

Q5456709.description: A blue field with a checkered yellow and black border, bearing a central pattern of white wavy stripes, yellow caducei, white stars, and gold pretzel-like loops.

Q5456713.description: A dark blue field with a large white sunburst (white lightning-bolt rays and stars radiating outward) centered, surrounding a small circular blue-and-white scene of a ship and waterfront.

Q5456721.description: A white field crossed by four wavy blue horizontal stripes representing the Ohio River. Centered is a large red letter "C" enclosing a white disc bearing the Latin motto "JUNCTA JUVANT" above a balance scale, a sword, and a caduceus. A small red mural crown sits above the C.

Q5456733.description: Quartered: blue with thirteen white stars in the upper hoist, red and yellow lions in the upper fly, fleurs-de-lis on white in the lower hoist, red and white vertical stripes in the lower fly, with the city seal centered on a white roundel.

Q5456735.description: A yellow field bearing a white Scandinavian-style cross fimbriated in red — the cross offset toward the hoist.

Q5456750.description: A blue field with gold sun rays radiating from the top center, crossed by a red horizontal stripe bearing two gold leaves, with a small gold bird perched on a basket at the bottom.

Q5456759.description: A horizontal bicolor of yellow (top) with white sunburst rays and orange (bottom). A brown equestrian statue (Andrew Jackson on horseback) is centered across the boundary, with "CITY OF JACKSONVILLE, FLORIDA" arched in white text below and a yellow silhouette of the county shape in the lower fly.

Q5456761.description: Three vertical bands of blue, green, and red separated by narrow white stripes, with the black and gold city coat of arms centered on the green band within a gold diamond outline.

Q5456768.description: A yellow field bearing two black double-headed eagles facing outward and flanking a central red and blue shield with three gold crowns and a star.

Q5456769.description: A blue field with a grey diagonal band running from lower hoist to upper fly. At the upper hoist over the diagonal, a circular seal: "CITY OF LAS VEGAS / NEVADA" around a stylized desert-city emblem.

Q5456771.description: A field divided diagonally into alternating black and white triangles meeting at center, with the Lisbon coat of arms centered: a black shield bordered in gold bearing a sailing ship on green waves flanked by two black ravens, surmounted by a gold mural crown. White scrolls below read "MUI NOBRE E SEMPRE LEAL CIDADE DE LISBOA".

Q5456775.description: A light blue field with a wide white diagonal band running from the lower hoist to the upper fly. Centered on the band is a stylized black four-pointed Zia-style symbol with a yellow disc at its center.

Q5456786.description: A red field with a white canton at the upper hoist containing a green pine tree.

Q5456787.description: Three horizontal bands of red (narrow, top), white (wide, middle), and dark blue (narrow, bottom), with three gold fleurs-de-lis arranged in a triangle (two above, one below) centered on the white band.

Q5456797.description: Three equal vertical stripes of blue, yellow, and blue, with the Philadelphia coat of arms centered on the yellow stripe — a shield with a ship and plough supported by two female figures, above a banner reading "PHILADELPHIA MANETO".

Q5456801.description: Three vertical bands of black, yellow, and black, with the city coat of arms centered on the yellow band: a black shield with a checkered fess, three gold roundels, and a triple-towered castle above.

Q5456804.description: A green field with a stylized white-on-yellow-on-blue Scandinavian-style cross (concentric layered cross: green-yellow-blue-white) extending to the edges.

Q5456811.description: A dark blue field over two unequal red horizontal stripes separated and bordered by thin white lines at the bottom; centered on the blue field, a white silhouette of a man with a paddle stands in a boat on white wavy water, surrounded by a circle of thirteen white stars.

Q5456822.description: A teal field bearing a centered white silhouette portrait of Chief Seattle in profile, facing the hoist.

Q5456835.description: A white field bearing a red Scandinavian-style saltire (red X-shaped cross extending corner to corner).

Q5456853.description: A blue field with a yellow rising sun (half-disc) centered on the lower edge; in front of and over the sun, a stylized white-and-green silhouette of a Chatham Island shape.

Q5456858.description: An orange field bordered top and bottom by a green-and-yellow striped band. Centered, a yellow circular seal reading "SEAL OF THE CHEROKEE NATION" enclosing a green wreath and a seven-pointed yellow star. Surrounding the seal, seven yellow seven-pointed stars; a single black seven-pointed star sits in the upper fly corner.

Q5456860.description: A white field bearing a red Greek cross extending to the edges, with a small emblem in each of the four quarters (horseshoe and pestle, black bull, whale, sailing ship), and the British royal crown centered on the cross.

Q5456894.description: A blue field bearing the U.S. Air Force coat of arms in the center: a shield with 13 white stars and a crest including a North American bald eagle, a cloud formation, and a wreath of six alternating folds of silver and blue.

Q5456895.description: A white field with a dark blue Great Seal of the United States in the center. "UNITED STATES COAST GUARD" arcs in dark blue above the eagle; the motto "SEMPER PARATUS" and "1790" appear beneath in dark blue.

Q5456897.description: A scarlet red field bearing the Marine Corps emblem centered: a gold eagle perched on a globe (showing the Western Hemisphere with black-and-white horizontal stripes across the Americas), with a gold fouled anchor crossed behind. A white scroll in the eagle's beak reads "SEMPER FIDELIS". Below the emblem, a white ribbon banner reads "UNITED STATES MARINE CORPS" in red letters.

Q5456898.description: A white field bearing a blue replica of the War Office Seal in the center. Below the seal is a broad scarlet scroll with "United States Army" in white letters, with "1775" in blue Arabic numerals beneath.

Q5456899.description: A dark blue field with the seal of the U.S. Department of the Navy in the center. A yellow scroll inscribed "United States Navy" in dark blue lettering appears below the seal.

Q5718507.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red over yellow.

Q5718574.description: Five equal horizontal bands of light blue and white (light blue top and bottom), with three white five-pointed stars arranged horizontally on the central light blue band.

Q5718647.description: Three equal horizontal stripes of green, white, and green, with a red triangle at the hoist pointing toward the fly. An arc of small red five-pointed stars curves across the white and green stripes in the center.

Q5718690.description: Three equal vertical bands of light blue (hoist), white, and light blue, with the Neuquén provincial emblem centered on the white band: a small mountain scene with a green tree above and a green laurel wreath surrounding, with twenty-one small yellow five-pointed stars arching above.

Q5718795.description: A light blue field bearing the Sofia coat of arms centered — a quartered shield with a castle crown above and a banner below reading "РАСТЕ НО НЕ СТАРѢЕ", flanked by oak branches.

Q5718867.description: Three horizontal bands: blue (top), white (center), green (bottom). A black canton at the upper hoist contains a ring of small white five-pointed stars.

Q5718924.description: A white field with the word MERCOSUL in large blue capitals across the lower portion, a green curved horizon line above the word, and four blue four-pointed stars arranged in the Southern Cross constellation above the horizon.

Q6363891.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow (top) and red.

Q6393175.description: Three vertical bands of blue, red, and blue, with the red band twice the width of the blue bands and bearing the city coat of arms centered.

Q6919069.description: A dark blue field with a white crescent moon in the upper hoist, the word "LIBERTY" in dark blue arched within the crescent's curve.

Q6950149.description: A red field bearing a centered large white horizontal infinity symbol (figure-eight on its side).

Q7195389.description: A white field bearing a green pine tree centered, with the words "AN APPEAL TO HEAVEN" in black above.

Q7373877.description: A light blue field with the red and white Canadian flag (red maple leaf on white center, red vertical bands) in the upper hoist canton, and the RCAF roundel (dark blue and white concentric circles with a red maple leaf at the center) in the fly.

Q7455752.description: A vertical banner: red field with a tall white rectangular panel centered, bearing a single dark blue five-pointed star centered within the panel.

Q7624391.description: Three equal horizontal bands of black, red, and yellow (gold), with the East German emblem centered — a wreath of grain encircling a black hammer and compass with a black-red-gold sash at the base.

Q8042899.description: Seven equal horizontal bands — purple, blue, light blue, green, yellow, orange, red — with the white word "PACE" centered across them.

Q8134193.description: A green field bearing a blue canton in the upper hoist charged with three white castles, and a gold Irish harp at the fly.

Q8242038.description: A buff field bearing the Mexico City coat of arms centered: a blue shield with a triple-towered gold castle on a bridge above water, flanked by three gold lions, all within a yellow border charged with green prickly-pear cactus pads.

Q9260246.description: A white field with two horizontal blue stripes (one wide, one narrow) in the lower half, and the city coat of arms in the upper hoist (a red shield bearing a white sword crossed with two yellow fish).

Q9260409.description: Two equal vertical bands of dark red at the hoist and gold at the fly.

Q9260434.description: A yellow field bearing a blue saltire.

Q9260601.description: Three equal vertical stripes of red, white, and red. Centered on the white stripe, a red shield bearing a white eagle with a yellow wheel below and small white roses flanking.

Q9646110.description: A light blue field bearing a white stylized atom centered, encircled by a white laurel wreath.

Q9647178.description: Yellow and green triangles meeting at the center to form an X-pattern, with a white square bearing the municipal coat of arms in the middle.

Q10337049.description: A magenta field with a white stylized geometric emblem centered: a trapezoidal frame opening downward, enclosing three yellow stylized mountain peaks rising from a central point.

Q10477339.description: A red field with a narrow white vertical stripe at the hoist.

Q10955332.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow (top) and blue, with a black shield centered over the divide bearing a black hammer, retort, and cogwheel (Katowice industrial emblem) on yellow.

Q10986849.description: The flag that is used as the symbol of Kashubia, a region in Central Europe, and the Kashubian people, is divided horizontally into black and yellow stripes.

Q11698218.description: A flag divided diagonally from upper hoist to lower fly: upper-fly triangle yellow, lower-hoist triangle blue.

Q11721817.description: Quartered into four sections: upper hoist light blue with a dark blue silhouette of Mount Kinabalu; upper fly mid-blue; lower hoist light blue; lower fly white. A horizontal red band runs along the bottom.

Q12060608.description: A white field with a vertical red stripe along the hoist (broken with white) and a red triangular cutout from the fly. Centered is the Samogitian coat of arms: a red shield bearing a black bear, surmounted by a gold crown and flanked by two grey figures (a knight and a maiden), with a banner below reading "PATRIA UNA".

Q12143337.description: A red field bearing a single gold lion facing the hoist, with blue claws and tongue.

Q12143496.description: A white field with two narrow horizontal yellow stripes across the middle, bearing the city coat of arms centered: a blue shield with a gold eagle.

Q12143610.description: A yellow field bearing a centered red gonfanon — a stylized red banner shape with three rounded pendant tongues, outlined in green.

Q12143656.description: A flag divided into three sections: the larger left section bears alternating vertical yellow and red stripes (the Provençal pattern); the upper right is a yellow field with a blue dolphin (the Dauphiné dolphin); the lower right is a white field with a red eagle on three blue waves (the arms of Nice).

Q12373049.description: A blue field bearing a white cross extending to the edges (the horizontal arm slightly above center).

Q12409908.description: Three equal vertical stripes of dark blue, red, and light blue. Centered over the red stripe, a golden Australian Defence Force emblem — a winged crowned eagle perched on an anchor with crossed swords behind, above a scroll.

Q12601313.description: A white field bearing the stylized Seoul logo: a red disc, a green curved shape, and a blue brush-stroke figure forming an abstract human figure.

Q12751889.description: A white field bearing a stylized swooping star in black and dark blue with a small red comma-shape above, with "CITY OF TALLAHASSEE" in black serif text beneath.

Q14515862.description: A green field bearing a centered black rampant lion with red claws and tongue. Across the middle, two narrow horizontal white stripes (a fess of two thin white lines) separated by a thin green stripe pass behind the lion.

Q14515865.description: Five horizontal bands of red, blue, yellow, green, and white (top to bottom).

Q14515866.description: A square flag divided horizontally: upper half white bearing the bold yellow motto "LIBERTÉ ET PATRIE" (Liberty and Country), each letter outlined in black; lower half solid green.

Q14624058.description: A white field bearing the centered five Olympic rings — interlocked rings of blue, yellow, black, green, and red.

Q14753997.description: Two equal horizontal bands of green (top) and white.

Q15978065.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and white, with the Santo André coat of arms centered on the boundary: a yellow shield bearing a green saltire, topped by a silver mural crown, with a green banner reading "PAVLISTARVM TERRA MATER" below.

Q15994084.description: Five equal horizontal stripes of red and white alternating (red at the top and bottom), with a blue equilateral triangle at the hoist bearing a single white five-pointed star.

Q16489490.description: A blue field bearing a white Greek cross extending to the edges; centered on the cross, a white shield outlined in blue contains a single blue five-pointed star.

Q16630001.description: A red field bearing a white Greek cross extending to the edges of the flag.

Q16630951.description: Nine equal horizontal bands alternating yellow and red, starting and ending with yellow (the Senyera / Aragonese pattern).

Q17053858.description: A yellow field bearing an unfilled purple ring centered.

Q17094384.description: Three equal horizontal bands of magenta-pink, yellow, and cyan-blue.

Q17335307.description: A red field with a gold heraldic emblem at the upper hoist: a wreath of grain encircling a small shield (yellow with red horizontal stripes); above the shield, a green crescent.

Q17493086.description: Two equal horizontal bands of yellow (top) and green.

Q19570909.description: A light blue field with yellow rays radiating from the center, bearing a red ring around a white snow leopard atop a hot-air balloon, with the word "ASTANA" on a red banner below.

Q20020313.description: A pale tan field with a multicolored rainbow arc — red, yellow, and blue — sweeping across the upper half; below the arc sit stylized brown mesas representing the four sacred mountains, with a circular white emblem at the center showing a corn stalk, hogan, and other Navajo symbols inside a yellow rainbow ring.

Q20106031.description: A red field bearing a white Scandinavian cross fimbriated in red — the white cross is outlined with a thin red border and shifted toward the hoist.

Q20900820.description: A purple field bearing a white stylized emblem centered, formed of a circle with six radiating arrow-like points.

Q21752527.description: A dark red field crossed by a horizontal yellow stripe, with the city coat of arms centered: a red shield bearing the figure of Saint Christopher in white carrying the Christ Child across a river.

Q22271870.description: A blue and yellow field with a complex coat of arms across the top edge featuring scallop shells, lions, and crosses, and a large white sailing ship at the center.

Q23925186.description: A yellow field bearing a black double-headed eagle holding a sword and a globus cruciger, surmounted by a crown.

Q24189944.description: A blue field bearing a red Nordic-style cross with yellow fimbriation, with four emblems in the quarters: a sailing ship, a golden ram, a brown bull’s head, and a sheaf of wheat.

Q27500175.description: A red field with the British Union Jack in the canton at the upper hoist. Across the bottom of the field in white, the words "LIBERTY AND UNION".

Q27966457.description: A white field over a red field (two equal horizontal bands), with a blue triangle at the hoist whose point reaches the center of the flag.

Q28103023.description: A white field with a vertical yellow stripe at the hoist bearing three red horn shapes (hunting horns) stacked vertically; a horizontal blue stripe extends from the yellow band into the field.

Q28109172.description: A solid black horizontal band centered on a white field (top white, black middle band, bottom white).

Q30591141.description: A white field with four red triangles pointing inward from each corner, charged in the center with a blue disc bearing the Wichita "sun" symbol (a stylized white sunface with rays).

Q30637174.description: Two equal horizontal bands of dark blue (top) and cream (bottom). Centered over the divide, a yellow ring with a red disc inside, the disc bearing a white six-pointed star and crowned with three small yellow trapezoidal shapes hanging below the ring.

Q30715977.description: A vertical bicolor of red (hoist) and white, with the Vendée heraldic emblem (a stylized red and white double Sacred Heart topped by a small crown and cross) centered across the boundary.

Q30905330.description: A white field bearing a light blue Nordic-style cross (vertical and horizontal blue bands, with the vertical arm shifted toward the hoist).

Q30909105.description: A red field with a white (silver) lion rampant facing the hoist. Across the top of the flag is a horizontal blue chief bearing three gold fleurs-de-lis.

Q32094061.description: A solid dark red field bearing a white shield outlined in red containing eight red rampant lions arranged around a centered gold crown.

Q32859372.description: A solid magenta-purple field bearing a centered white shield outlined in grey, depicting a white-and-grey castle with two towers, a single yellow five-pointed star above, all over blue wavy water along the shield's base.

Q39075174.description: A red field bearing a yellow Cross of Toulouse centered: a Greek-style cross with each arm ending in three pommels (small discs), all voided so the red field shows through.

Q42888728.description: A white field bearing a red Nordic-style cross composed of decorative cross-stitch embroidery patterns.

Q47013273.description: Five equal horizontal bands of light blue, pink, white, pink, and light blue.

Q48790336.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue, white, and green, separated by narrow red stripes.

Q48990056.description: A blue field bearing a white roundel centered with a yellow border, containing a fan of national flags of the OAS member states arranged in a circle.

Q54953696.description: A blue field bearing a centered white stylized Greek temple façade with columns, pediment, and steps, with the white word "UNESCO" between the columns.

Q56027897.description: A flag divided vertically: white at the hoist with a row of small blue rectangular crenellations across the top; blue at the fly. Centered, a large yellow-and-red coin depicting the head of Alexander the Great in profile.

Q60521341.description: A horizontal band of dark blue across the upper half and cream across the lower half. Centered, a stylized fountain emblem — a blue fountain spraying from a basin within a yellow ring with three yellow rectangular drops below.

Q61641270.description: Three equal horizontal bands of lavender, white, and green.

Q61641559.description: Three equal horizontal bands of magenta-pink, green, and blue.

Q61642103.description: Eight horizontal stripes of black, brown, red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple from top to bottom.

Q61642208.description: Four equal horizontal bands of black, gray, white, and purple.

Q61650188.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue, red, and black, charged in the center with a yellow Greek letter pi.

Q62398023.description: A field of green (top), yellow, and light green, divided by a wide off-white saltire (X-shape) edged with darker green, extending to the corners.

Q62566806.description: A white field with a purple horizontal stripe across the middle and a light gray lower half, with a black triangle extending from the hoist.

Q62566815.description: Six equal horizontal stripes of red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple, charged in the center with a black double Venus symbol (two interlocked female symbols).

Q62566819.description: A purple field bearing a large black inverted triangle centered, with a white double-headed axe (labrys) inside the triangle.

Q62604586.description: Four equal horizontal bands of yellow, white, purple, and black.

Q62604938.description: Seven horizontal stripes, symmetrical: black, gray, white, light green, white, gray, black from top to bottom.

Q62668720.description: A red field bearing a white disc centered with a stylized black thunderbird (Aztec-style eagle) inside.

Q62920304.description: A yellow field bearing three red Latin (cross-bottony style) crosses arranged in a triangle (two above, one below), with a stylized red Christogram or chair-like emblem centered.

Q62931620.description: A blue field bearing a centered scalloped yellow circular border around a black ring of small yellow stars, enclosing a large red letter "H" with a small crown above it.

Q63063601.description: Two horizontal bands of white (top) and red, with "SANTA CLARA" in red letters arched above a centered round seal of the City of Santa Clara, California showing the Mission and "The Mission City" inscription.

Q63874022.description: Three horizontal bands of red (top), white, and red, with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing a circle of white five-pointed stars.

Q63874403.description: Divided vertically: at the hoist a square red field bearing a blue saltire edged in white with thirteen white five-pointed stars (the Confederate Battle Flag), occupying the full hoist height; the fly is a plain white field with a vertical red band along the outer edge.

Q63889113.description: Five horizontal stripes of dark green, light green, white, gray, and black from top to bottom.

Q63967901.description: Seven horizontal stripes, symmetrical: gray, light gray, light blue, white, light blue, light gray, gray from top to bottom.

Q70385989.description: Three equal horizontal bands of green (top), yellow, and red.

Q78519496.description: A light blue field above a stylized dark blue city skyline silhouette (chevron-shaped), with a green hill below.

Q78520887.description: Three equal horizontal bands of dark green, white, and dark green. Centered on the white band, a dark green stylized arrow pointing upward (a triangle with a small rectangular tail).

Q79678237.description: A red field bearing two centered white wheels (six-spoked) joined by a white diagonal cross-bar, forming the Mainzer Rad (wheel of Mainz) emblem.

Q81002110.description: A white field with a colored emblem at the center showing a wooden grain mill beside trees, with the words TAYLORED WITH PRIDE on a curved ribbon below.

Q82876072.description: A square red field surrounded by concentric square frames of green, yellow, and blue, with a jagged red border around the outside (representing flame).

Q85761218.description: A white field crossed by stylized blue and white wavy bands suggesting a river, sweeping across to a green hill at the lower fly. A yellow sun with rays sits in the upper hoist.

Q93879664.description: Five equal horizontal bands of pink, white, magenta, dark gray, and blue.

Q94600451.description: A dark blue field bearing a centered photographic-style image of planet Earth (white and blue).

Q94652289.description: A black field with the Space Force delta emblem centered (a silver upward-pointing arrowhead in front of a blue globe with white grid lines, an orbit ring, and a white polestar above), surrounded by small white stars. Below, in white, "UNITED STATES SPACE FORCE" with "MMXIX" beneath.

Q96246037.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), white, and red, with a large blue five-pointed star centered on the white band surrounded by a ring of nineteen smaller blue five-pointed stars.

Q96378012.description: A red field with a yellow Zia sun symbol centered, a yellow circle in its middle bearing the date 1706. A small yellow bird sits in the upper hoist and the name "Albuquerque" appears in yellow script along the lower edge.

Q96378013.description: A white field bearing a centered red, white, and blue shield containing a yellow lamp of knowledge, with a winged crown emblem above the shield and the text "CITY OF AUSTIN" curved below it in dark blue.

Q96378015.description: Two official flags. The first is a white field with a blue saltire (St Andrew's cross) and the round city seal of Charlotte–Mecklenburg County centered. The second is a green field with a stylized white crown.

Q96378017.description: A dark blue field with a central round emblem: a yellow disc with rays surrounding a black five-pointed star, framed by a green laurel wreath and two white banners reading "CITY OF EL PASO" and "TEXAS".

Q96378019.description: Divided diagonally from upper hoist to lower fly into three triangular sections of white, red, and dark blue. A yellow rounded square with the city–county seal sits centered at the hoist.

Q96474154.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and red, with the Chorzów coat of arms centered over the divide — a yellow-bordered shield divided vertically with a yellow rising eagle on blue at the hoist and a vertical letter F (or hammer) on black at the fly.

Q96602193.description: A blue field bearing three gold fleurs-de-lis arranged in a triangle (two above, one below).

Q96602573.description: A red field with a white classical building motif centered, depicting three white columns labeled "JUSTICE", "WISDOM", and "MODERATION" beneath an arch reading "CONSTITUTION", with a small figure of a soldier between the right columns.

Q96633914.description: Six equal horizontal stripes of the rainbow pride flag (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, violet) with a triangular chevron at the hoist containing additional stripes: black, brown, light blue, light pink, and white.

Q96676582.description: A black and white US flag (stars on black field at the hoist, alternating black and white horizontal stripes) with one stripe replaced by a horizontal blue line.

Q96695294.description: Seven equal horizontal bands of dark orange, orange, light orange, white, pink, mauve, and dark magenta.

Q96742561.description: Three horizontal bands of white, green, and light gray, with a black triangle at the hoist pointing toward the fly.

Q96761402.description: Three horizontal bands of blue (top), white, and red, with a red square canton in the upper hoist bearing the Confederate Battle Flag (blue saltire edged in white with thirteen white five-pointed stars on red).

Q96912183.description: A blue field with the seal of the United States Merchant Marine centered — an eagle perched atop a roundel containing an anchor and shield, ringed by the text "UNITED STATES MERCHANT MARINE". The yellow inscription "IN PEACE AND WAR" curves above the seal; "1775" appears below in yellow.

Q96912281.description: A dark blue field with a small disc near the top of the hoist bearing horizontal stripes of blue, yellow, and red. Below it is a gold eagle clutching a banner reading "US ARMY TRAINING AND DOCTRINE COMMAND".

Q96957656.description: A field divided vertically into a blue hoist half and a white fly half. In the fly half, a small white shield bordered black with an ermine chief and a solid blue lower section, with a single rounded tongue at its base.

Q96958387.description: Three horizontal bands: white (top), light blue (center, thin), red (bottom). Centered over the bands, the Kołobrzeg coat of arms — a shield with two red towers above and a fish-and-bishop's-staff motif on blue below.

Q96963401.description: A white field bearing a light blue saltire (X-shape) extending to the corners. Centered is the U.S. Department of the Interior seal: a circular yellow-bordered emblem showing an American bison standing before mountains and a rising sun, with "U.S. DEPARTMENT OF THE INTERIOR" arched above and "MARCH 3, 1849" below.

Q96964221.description: A dark green field with a large yellow shield-shaped badge centered. The badge contains a yellow pine tree, the letters "US" flanking it, and the text "FOREST SERVICE" and "DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE" around the border.

Q96970847.description: A white field bearing a light blue Y-shape edged in green, with the points of the Y at the upper hoist, lower hoist, and fly. In the white triangle at the hoist, six red six-pointed stars arranged in a ring.

Q97019548.description: Three horizontal stripes of red, white, and red, with a tall dark blue canton along the entire hoist bearing the white circular seal of Georgia.

Q97164441.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red over green.

Q97302474.description: A dark blue field with the large gold Seal of Georgia centered (showing the Constitution arch with three columns and a soldier). Below the seal is a gold banner reading "GEORGIA'S HISTORY" displaying five small historical U.S. and Georgia flags, with "IN GOD WE TRUST" beneath.

Q97303170.description: A red field with a small Union Flag of Great Britain (pre-1801, without the cross of St. Patrick) in the canton at the hoist.

Q97486721.description: A white field with a green circular emblem centered showing the outline of Florida with a small capitol building above the word "LEON", encircled by the text "FLORIDA'S CAPITAL COUNTY".

Q97502970.description: A white field with a centered arch-shaped emblem: green palm trees frame an orange sunset over green fields with a small plane and tractor, with "FLORIDA" arching at the top and "CITY OF HOMESTEAD 1913" on a yellow banner below.

Q98153217.description: A dark blue field with "DONT GIVE UP THE SHIP" in large white hand-lettered capitals across two lines.

Q98400609.description: A light blue field bearing two diagonal stripes (one blue, one white, edged in white) running from the upper fly to the lower hoist, with a green triangular wedge in the lower hoist corner.

Q98538622.description: A solid red field with the white wordmark "REWE" centered in large bold letters.

Q98609686.description: Divided into three horizontal sections (black top, white middle, red bottom) by a stylized white koru (spiral fern frond) that curls from the hoist into the fly.

Q100711795.description: A white field bearing a green circle (with a light blue inner area) containing a green tree silhouette, and the words "TREE CITY USA" in green below.

Q105593273.description: Three equal horizontal bands of yellow, light gray, and sandy brown.

Q105652911.description: Seven horizontal bands shading from dark teal at the top through mint green, pale green, white at the center, then light blue, indigo, and dark purple at the bottom.

Q105798861.description: A vertical tricolor of green, white, and red with the year "1824" in black serif numerals on the central white stripe.

Q106498465.description: A red field divided by a white Scandinavian-style cross (shifted toward the hoist), with a white fish (rouget) charge in the upper hoist quarter.

Q106498475.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), yellow, and black.

Q106498488.description: A light blue field bearing a white Nordic-style cross (vertical and horizontal white bands, with the vertical arm shifted toward the hoist).

Q106498499.description: Quartered: upper hoist and lower fly yellow, upper fly and lower hoist blue, separated by a white cross. Centered on the cross is a yellow shield with three red roundels and a small white animal figure, surmounted by a small crown.

Q106498503.description: A white field with 6 alternating white (top) and blue horizontal blue stripes of equal width.

Q106498510.description: A vertical bicolor of red (hoist) and yellow.

Q106498596.description: A white field overlaid with a red sunburst of curving wavy rays radiating from the center, with a small white square in the upper hoist bearing a red mill wheel.

Q106498608.description: A vertical bicolor divided down the middle, white at the hoist and black at the fly.

Q106498686.description: A vertical bicolor of yellow (hoist) and red.

Q106498696.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and white.

Q106498712.description: A blue field bearing a yellow Nordic-style cross (with the vertical arm shifted toward the hoist).

Q106500855.description: A vertical bicolor of blue at the hoist and red at the fly, with a white shield centered across the join: the shield has a blue chief bearing three gold fleurs-de-lis, below which are three red horizontal bars on a white ground.

Q106500988.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), white, and red.

Q106501377.description: A vertical bicolor, dark blue at the hoist and yellow at the fly.

Q106501431.description: Divided vertically: the hoist half is blue semé (strewn) with gold fleurs-de-lis; the fly half is red bearing a centered white three-towered castle with three small white roundels below.

Q106501478.description: A horizontal bicolor of red (top) and green.

Q106501701.description: A red field bearing the city's coat of arms centered: a blue shield with gold fleurs-de-lis surmounted by a crowned crest. Text on a banner below.

Q106501843.description: A vertical bicolor of blue (hoist) and yellow.

Q106501923.description: A vertical bicolor, yellow at the hoist and blue at the fly.

Q106676586.description: A vertical bicolor, red at the hoist and yellow at the fly.

Q106677160.description: A flag divided vertically: a yellow hoist with a black lion rampant holding a red bishop's crozier, and a white fly strewn with black ermine spots and bearing a black boar holding a red brick tower with golden crown.

Q106677308.description: A flag divided vertically, white at the hoist and dark blue at the fly, with a blue shield in the center. Q106677661.description: Six horizontal stripes alternating white and red, beginning with white at the top.

Q106681223.description: A vertical bicolor, black at the hoist and yellow at the fly.

Q106682384.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue (top), yellow, and green.

Q106737226.description: A field divided diagonally: a red triangle at the hoist edged in white and dark blue, bearing three white five-pointed stars, points into a dark blue rectangle in the fly upper half (with white letters reading "THREE / RIVERS") and a white field in the lower half.

Q106881938.description: A white field with two blue triangular wedges meeting at center: one pointing in from the hoist and one pointing in from the fly, with white triangles above and below.

Q106916570.description: A vertical tricolor of black, white, and yellow.

Q107434358.description: A medium blue field with a large white pelican in flight at the center, surrounded by seven white five-pointed stars arranged around it.

Q107452170.description: A dark charcoal gray field crossed by a band of five parallel diagonal stripes running from upper fly to lower hoist, in green, light blue, white, pale yellow, and pink.

Q107689743.description: Seven horizontal bands of pink, light pink, lavender, white, lavender, light blue, and blue, symmetric around the central white stripe.

Q107787322.description: Six equal horizontal stripes (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple) in the fly, with a chevron pattern of black, brown, light blue, light pink, and white stripes pointing toward the fly from the hoist.
