Q109648662.description: A light blue field bearing a white coat of arms with a sailing ship centered.

Q110638075.description: A red field bisected by a wide white diagonal band edged in white scallops, running from the upper hoist to the lower fly. The two red triangles each bear three yellow crowns trimmed with white clover-leaf trefoils.

Q110728191.description: A black field with a rampant white lion crowned in gold, with a red tongue and yellow claws, wearing a gold collar with a small cross.

Q110873677.description: Five equal horizontal bands of light pink, magenta, dark indigo, blue, and light blue.

Q111593132.description: A blue field with the coat of arms of Fredericton centered in white: a quartered shield with a Union Jack, a stag, and other charges, surrounded by a wreath, with a banner motto below.

Q111594634.description: Two equal horizontal bands of dark blue over yellow, with a white royal crown in the upper hoist.

Q111595928.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white over green, with the city's coat of arms centered on the divide showing a golden tower with a Madonna and rays above.

Q111912959.description: A vertical bicolor of blue (hoist) and orange, with a white stylized figure of a boy rolling up his sleeve centered across the boundary.

Q111940360.description: A black field with two red diagonal bands running from the upper corners toward the center; a gold laurel wreath surrounds a gold upright sword in the middle.

Q112118624.description: A white field bearing a red Latin cross (vertical and horizontal bands forming an offset cross). The upper hoist canton is blue and bears nine small white crosslets arranged in a diagonal cross pattern.

Q112237896.description: A version of the U.S. flag in black and white instead of red, white, and blue, with one of the central horizontal stripes split into a red half at the hoist and a blue half at the fly.

Q112963130.description: A red field with the Burgundy coat of arms in the upper hoist canton: divided into two quarters, the hoist quarter blue semé with gold fleurs-de-lis bordered in red and white compony, the fly quarter yellow with blue diagonal bands.

Q112963333.description: A white shield with a blue ship in full sail under a yellow sun on a blue sea, supported by a white seahorse on either side and topped by a white dove with outstretched wings; a red banner reading NOUMEA crosses the base.

Q112963836.description: A flag divided vertically: a white hoist strewn with black ermine spots and a red fly bearing a large yellow crescent moon outlined in black with horns pointing upward.

Q112963947.description: A red rectangular flag bearing two crossed white keys with ornate bows, the heraldic emblem of the abbey town.

Q112963962.description: Alternating vertical stripes of red and yellow, with a centered blue shield bearing a smaller white shield with red roundels. There is a yellow key and a yellow cross above and below the inner shield respectively.

Q112964146.description: Two equal horizontal stripes, blue above and yellow below.

Q112964185.description: Four vertical red stripes (pales) on a yellow field — the arms of the Counts of Foix.

Q112964274.description: Three red vertical stripes on a yellow field.

Q112964386.description: A checkerboard of yellow and blue squares (six rows of nine, beginning with blue at the upper hoist).

Q112964480.description: A green field with "CANCALE" arched in white letters at the top, and the city coat of arms centered: a light blue shield bearing a white sailing boat between yellow shellfish (oysters), with a black eagle in the upper hoist and surmounted by a gold crown.

Q112964507.description: A red field with a black canton at the upper hoist containing a yellow rampant lion.

Q112964512.description: A field of horizontal blue and white stripes overlaid with a broad red diagonal band running from the upper hoist to the lower fly.

Q113110562.description: A red field with a yellow lion rampant crowned in gold centered.

Q113273238.description: Divided vertically: the hoist half is red, the fly half is green. Centered across the boundary is a yellow scepter topped by a yellow eight-pointed star.

Q113281232.description: A yellow field with a black lion rampant at the fly facing a blue shield bearing a yellow fleur-de-lis at the hoist.

Q113281327.description: A vertical bicolor, blue at the hoist and yellow at the fly.

Q113282170.description: A blue field with a yellow heraldic ship under a white ermine-spotted sail floating on a green wavy base. Along the top runs a band of red and white triangles (vairy) bordered with red.

Q113282500.description: A vertical tricolor of blue, yellow, and green.

Q113283481.description: A white field semé with vertical black billets, charged with a large black lion rampant in the center.

Q113284094.description: A blue field bearing a centered white five-petaled flower (rose) with a red center and dark wavy stamens (the Hagenau rose).

Q113289407.description: A flag divided vertically green at the hoist and red at the fly, with a central green shield bearing a white eagle in the chief and three white bishop's croziers around a yellow pillar.

Q113289490.description: A white field strewn with black ermine spots and charged with three large red axe-headed staves arranged in a row.

Q113289935.description: A horizontally divided flag: upper half white strewn with black ermine spots, lower half red bearing a yellow castle with three crenellated towers.

Q113289970.description: A red field with a yellow latticework fence-like grille (or three crenellated castle walls joined as a portcullis) in the center.

Q113290928.description: A blue field with a broad yellow saltire (diagonal cross), with a yellow scallop shell in each of the four quarters.

Q113292522.description: A vertical bicolor of blue at the hoist and red at the fly, with a white shield centered across the join: the shield shows a red Phrygian cap above blue wavy water.

Q113292636.description: A vertical bicolor of blue and yellow.

Q113292876.description: A red field with a wide yellow diagonal band from the upper hoist to the lower fly, with three yellow crowns trimmed in white trefoils on each side of the band (six crowns total).

Q113293013.description: Three yellow fleurs-de-lis on a blue field, arranged two above one, with a white anchor centered below them.

Q113293248.description: A blue field divided by a black-edged white cross; in the canton at the upper hoist, a yellow square bears three white lozenges (diamonds) each charged with a small black ermine spot, and the lower fly quarter is yellow.

Q113293379.description: A vertical bicolor of blue and red with a white shield centered across the join: the shield shows a red Phrygian cap above blue wavy water.

Q113293855.description: A red field bordered in black bearing fifteen yellow lozenges (diamonds) outlined in black arranged in three rows of five; at the center, a small black-bordered yellow square holds a black rampant lion.

Q113296067.description: A vertical bicolor of blue at the hoist and yellow at the fly.

Q113303776.description: A blue field with three yellow fleurs-de-lis across the top and a large white anchor centered below.

Q113303964.description: Quartered into four squares: upper hoist and lower fly white bearing five black ermine spots each; upper fly and lower hoist blue bearing a white sailing ship.

Q113307728.description: A vertical bicolor of yellow at the hoist and blue at the fly.

Q113329508.description: A yellow field with a wide blue diagonal band running from upper hoist to lower fly, charged with three white crescents.

Q113329734.description: A vertical bicolor of blue at the hoist and yellow at the fly, with a shield centered across the join: the shield is halved blue and yellow with two crescents in counterchanged colors.

Q113329858.description: A light blue field bearing three yellow trefoil (three-lobed leaf) shapes arranged in a triangle (two above, one below).

Q113329986.description: A yellow field with the black letters G and K in the upper corners and a black horseshoe centered below them.

Q113330139.description: A red field bearing two yellow fish facing upward (their tails at the bottom), placed back-to-back in the center.

Q113331714.description: A blue shield with a yellow diagonal baton or club running from lower hoist to upper fly, accompanied by two gold five-pointed stars.

Q113332085.description: A shield quartered red and black with white and gold charges including a central gold double-headed eagle on a black square, two gold acanthus-like ornaments on the red quarters, and rampant white lions on the black quarters.

Q113332229.description: A light blue field with three yellow scallop-shaped or stylized flower charges, two above and one below.

Q113341364.description: A white shield bearing two red hearts side by side, each topped with red flames.

Q113341653.description: A blue, red, and white quartered shield headed by a red banner with LE CONQUET in white; charges include a yellow anchor and tower, three white seabirds, a fish, a sailing boat on a green base, and a rampant lion.

Q113342666.description: A shield with a white chief bearing five rows of black ermine spots, and a green lower field charged with a yellow mermaid combing her hair.

Q113353392.description: A field of vertical yellow and red stripes — four red stripes alternating with five yellow stripes.

Q113355334.description: A vertical bicolor of yellow at the hoist and red at the fly.

Q113357638.description: Two equal horizontal bands of blue (top) and yellow.

Q113361764.description: A red field with a large white sixteen-pointed star (the Star of the Magi) centered.

Q113373301.description: A purple field bearing a yellow shield charged with a red bend and a blue bend running parallel from upper hoist to lower fly.

Q113374373.description: A yellow field with a blue shield centered: the shield has a white chief bearing the black letters P P P, and the blue field below holds three yellow five-pointed stars arranged two above one.

Q113410900.description: Diagonal stripes of yellow and red running from upper hoist to lower fly.

Q113454233.description: A white shield showing a red-roofed white tower beside a small castellated building, with a standing armored figure in red and grey on a green hilltop; small red items dot the foreground.

Q113458974.description: Divided by a wide black cross extending to the edges. The upper hoist quarter is yellow bearing a black cross; the other three quarters are white bearing five black ermine spots each.

Q113460067.description: Two equal horizontal bands of red (top) and white, with the Dinslaken coat of arms centered: a white shield bearing a red four-towered castle with a black base, surmounted by a small white shield.

Q113469216.description: Quartered: upper hoist blue with three gold fleurs-de-lis; upper fly yellow with a blue dolphin with red fins; lower hoist yellow with a blue dolphin with red fins; lower fly blue with three gold fleurs-de-lis.

Q113470396.description: A red field with three white five-petaled roses arranged two above one, beneath a white horizontal band edged in blue wavy lines along the top.

Q113486017.description: A blue field with a green base, bearing a white church building with a tall steeple topped by a black cross and red roofs on the nave.

Q113486079.description: A yellow field with a large red ornamental cross at the center, its arms widening into curled fleur-like terminals.

Q113488706.description: Quartered: blue at upper hoist and lower fly, red at upper fly and lower hoist. The blue quarters bear a white rampant lion; the red quarters bear an upright golden wheat sheaf bound with a blue band.

Q113488799.description: A white field with a single large red five-petaled rose (a mon-style flower) centered.

Q113496762.description: Three horizontal bands of yellow, red, yellow — the middle red stripe narrower than the yellow above and below.

Q113518795.description: A blue field bearing the FBI seal centered: a circular gold rope border around a blue disc inscribed "DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE / FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION" with thirteen gold stars and the FBI shield (red, white, and blue stripes with laurel branches) in the center.

Q113519122.description: A blue field with and eagle standing on a shield facing to the left. The bird is holding arrows and olive branches. There is text above and below. The lower text is on a waving banner. Top text reads "DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE". The bottom text is latin and reads "QUI DOMINA JUSTITIA SEQUITUR".

Q113544391.description: A field divided into quarters by a white cross: the upper hoist and lower fly quarters are light blue and contain a yellow oak leaf within a scalloped border, and the other two quarters are white.

Q113545526.description: A red field with a yellow shield centered showing a bundle of white asparagus spears tied together.

Q113546282.description: A red field with two white eagles facing each other and a yellow upright sceptre topped with a flame between them.

Q113546716.description: A yellow field with three red stylized fish or bottle-shaped charges arranged two above one, each pointing downward.

Q113547005.description: A blue field strewn with yellow fleurs-de-lis, surrounded by a border of alternating red and white squares.

Q113553388.description: A shield with a black chief reading MEHUN SUR YEVRE in white, a red middle band bearing a small yellow fleur-de-lis, and a yellow lower field.

Q113555538.description: A blue field with a white rampant lion centered, flanked by two small yellow fleurs-de-lis.

Q113555826.description: A vertical bicolor of green at the hoist and red at the fly.

Q113557131.description: A vertical bicolor of red at the hoist and yellow at the fly.

Q113558942.description: A red field with two contrasting halves: the hoist side bears a white band edged with stylized clouds along its diagonal edge, and the fly side has a yellow diagonal stripe with rows of yellow stylized crowns on the red background.

Q113558961.description: Three equal horizontal bands of yellow, red, and white.

Q113559383.description: Diagonal stripes of yellow and blue running from upper hoist to lower fly.

Q113559437.description: A red field bearing three gold lions rampant facing the hoist (two above, one below), each with blue claws and a small blue crown.

Q113559925.description: A blue chief bearing three yellow fleurs-de-lis above a red field with three white castle towers.

Q114243922.description: A white field bearing a red Saint George's cross. The upper hoist quarter is blue and divided by a smaller red cross into four sub-quarters, each bearing a white eight-pointed star.

Q114714073.description: A yellow field with the round seal of the city and county of Honolulu centered, depicting a striped shield flanked by mountains and a beach against a blue background, encircled by a rope and the words "CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU" and "STATE OF HAWAII".

Q114916903.description: Nine alternating horizontal stripes of yellow and red (five yellow, four red).

Q115152080.description: A diagonal field divided by a white band from upper hoist to lower fly: a purple triangle in the upper fly and a green triangle in the lower hoist, each charged with a white cross pattée.

Q115527338.description: A blue field bearing a centered dark red rectangle with white arched text "EXERCITVS SALVATIONIS" across the top and a gold and red eight-pointed star centered, the star inscribed "SANGVIS ET IGNIS".

Q116211178.description: Quartered red and yellow: red at the upper hoist and lower fly, yellow at the upper fly and lower hoist. The upper-hoist quarter bears a white crescent enclosing a white five-pointed star.

Q116211841.description: A yellow field with the green word "OAKLAND" arched above a green oak tree, with the date "1852" in green below.

Q116481827.description: A red field with the Union Jack in the upper hoist canton, and four white five-pointed stars in the fly arranged as the Southern Cross constellation.

Q116486314.description: A blue field bearing a large yellow letter "M" centered, with four white fleurs-de-lis arranged around it (one above, one below, one to each side).

Q116820815.description: A dark purple field with "PORTSMOUTH" in large white letters arched above a small "VIRGINIA" centered. A white wavy band runs across below, and a light blue lower section bears "TOWN 1752 · CITY 1858" in dark blue letters.

Q116995629.description: A red horizontal band at the top bearing three gold emblems — a winged wheel, a naval crown, and a cog — above a white field crossed by four wavy blue horizontal stripes.

Q117192105.description: A white flag with the words GMINA DOPIEWO in black across the upper center, above a colorful coat of arms showing a red device and lion charge on a yellow shield.

Q117811314.description: Three equal vertical bands of purple, white, and green; the white middle band bears a yellow circle inscribed PALO ALTO CALIFORNIA around a green pine tree, with INCORPORATED APRIL 16, 1894 in red letters across the tree.

Q117924542.description: A white field crossed by a horizontal and vertical band in blue with green edges, forming a centered cross. A round yellow city seal sits at the intersection, showing a small Arkansas-shaped emblem above a rocky outcrop in water.

Q118121879.description: A blue field with a large white disc centered, holding the city's emblem: a white diamond-shaped frame between two stylized towers with a snow leopard inside and "БИШКЕК" written below.

Q118756714.description: A blue field with the New Zealand ensign in the canton — Union Jack and four red stars of the Southern Cross — and a white badge in the fly showing the entwined NZP monogram within a wreath, topped by a crown.

Q119631640.description: A white field with the three Paralympic agitos in the center: a red crescent at the top, a blue crescent at the lower left, and a green crescent at the lower right, arranged around a central point.

Q120259831.description: A white field with a red shield centered showing a white rampant lion crowned in gold, with the word VITRE in black capitals below.

Q120260301.description: A yellow field with a shield centered showing a zigzag (dancetty) pattern of black and yellow running from upper hoist to lower fly, with the word MELESSE in black capitals below.

Q120830716.description: Three equal vertical bands of yellow, black, and green.

Q120987559.description: A yellow field divided by a red vertical pale and a black horizontal fess, forming a thick cross of red and black on yellow.

Q120987840.description: A vertical bicolor of green at the hoist and white at the fly.

Q121799143.description: Three horizontal bands of dark blue (top), white, and dark red, with the boundary between blue and white forming a mountain silhouette. A blue hexagonal badge bearing a yellow beehive and small white star is centered.

Q122460297.description: A blue square at the hoist bearing three white birds (ducks) in a row at the top, beside a plain white panel at the fly.

Q122872146.description: Two equal horizontal bands of white (top) and light blue.

Q122949398.description: Three equal horizontal bands of blue, white, and red, with the crowned municipal coat of arms centered, featuring a sailing ship on waves on a red shield.

Q122965273.description: Three equal vertical bands of red (hoist), white, and red.

Q122980426.description: A white field bearing a red cross with a red crescent in the lower hoist and a red five-pointed star in the upper hoist.

Q123102467.description: A red field bearing the Occitanie regional logo in yellow at the hoist (a stylized Occitan cross with a column of pellets) and white text reading "La Région / Occitanie / Pyrénées - Méditerranée" in the fly.

Q123422600.description: Quartered: blue with three gold fleurs-de-lis in the first and fourth quarters, red with a gold lion passant in the second and third quarters.

Q124128386.description: A solid green field bearing the Green Flag Award logo centered: a stylized white tree silhouette and ribbon inside a green disc, with "GREEN FLAG AWARD" in white letters below.

Q124414329.description: Two equal horizontal bands of light blue (top) and green, overlaid in the center by a yellow shield bordered blue. The shield contains two cyan wavy fesses (horizontal bars representing water) extending across its full width.

Q124477964.description: A white field with a yellow-bordered blue shield centered, containing the National Monument flanked by a sprig of cotton and an ear of rice, with red "JAYA RAYA" lettering at the top.

Q124527551.description: A yellow field bearing two red cows with blue horns and collars, one above the other, both facing the hoist.

Q126622169.description: A blue field with a large yellow crowned head of Saint Erik centered, facing forward.

Q127117943.description: A dark red field bearing the Santiago de Compostela coat of arms centered: a blue shield with a yellow chalice and four white scallop shells around it, plus a Roman-style temple at the lower fly, encircled by a green wreath and surmounted by a gold royal crown.

Q127691832.description: A red field bearing the city coat of arms centered: a quartered shield with two lions, a bull beneath a tree on a bridge, and red and yellow vertical stripes, topped by a gold crown.

Q128107601.description: A dark blue field with a yellow round city seal centered, depicting a phoenix rising from flames with wings spread, encircled by the words "RESURGENS · ATLANTA GA · 1847 · 1865".

Q129906101.description: A white field with a circular city seal centered showing a stylized desert and urban scene: green saguaro and city buildings against a yellow sun, with a purple landscape and lasso below, encircled by "CITY OF TUCSON · ARIZONA".

Q130530719.description: A white field with red text "MUNICIPIO DE PANAMÁ" across the top above a crowned shield quartered in red and yellow with castles, lions, and sailing ships.

Q130601806.description: Divided vertically: a green panel at the hoist bearing a sprig of purple saskatoon berries, and a fly section of horizontal yellow and white stripes overlaid with a round white city crest.

Q130603060.description: A white field with an elaborate blue-bordered shield centered. The upper half is red and shows a mounted rider, and the lower half depicts a green landscape with three volcanoes against a pale sky.

Q131584400.description: A yellow field crossed by a broad black diagonal band from upper hoist to lower fly, with a crowned red shield centered bearing a green emblem.

Q133050415.description: A blue field with a wide white wavy band representing the river curving across, a small green shape at the upper hoist and a yellow shape at the fly. A dark blue band along the bottom carries "CITY OF SACRAMENTO" in white.

Q133163324.description: A dark blue field with a large yellow circular ring overlaid on a yellow Latin cross. A small white and red disc in the center holds a stylized scene of pioneer figures and animals.

Q134438567.description: Three equal horizontal bands of red, white, and red, with a blue shield centered on the white band showing two robed figures above a small castle and palm tree.

Q135472669.description: A black field with a large white letter K at the hoist and a white skull above crossed bones (Jolly Roger) at the fly.

Q135479239.description: Five equal horizontal bands of orange, yellow, white, light blue, and dark blue.

Q135992817.description: A yellow field bearing three large red Chinese characters centered: 臺中市 (Taichung City).

Q136436975.description: A blue field with a yellow open Viking-style longship centered above stylized wave lines, surmounted by a yellow royal crown.

Q137163818.description: A dark blue field with two wavy vertical bands (light blue and yellow) at the fly, and a yellow Mission Inn bell tower silhouette centered toward the hoist.

Q137537567.description: Three equal vertical bands of dark blue (hoist), white (double width), and dark blue. Centered on the white band is the Leme coat of arms: a beige shield with a blue cross over an anchor, framed by green corn stalks and white cotton, with a blue ribbon below reading "LEME 1876 1895" and a silver mural crown above.

Q137685603.description: Three equal vertical bands of red, green, and blue.

Q137884710.description: A magenta field with a horizontal white stripe across the middle, charged in the center with a shield bearing a black eagle and topped by a gold crown.

Q138307557.description: A yellow field bearing a black-bordered seal centered, with "City of Naga, Cebu, Philippines" around the rim and three small scenes inside the seal.

Q138776329.description: A blue chief along the top bearing four yellow medieval sailing ships. Below, a yellow field with a red chevron carrying a gold mitre, a sheaf of wheat, a sheep, and a wavy blue river band beneath.

Q139033938.description: Three equal vertical bands of dark blue (hoist), white (double width), and dark blue. The Tamboril coat of arms is centered on the white band: a shield divided into four quadrants showing rural and farming scenes, framed by white cotton bolls and green leaves, with a blue five-pointed star above.

Q139493892.description: Five equal horizontal bands of yellow, red, yellow, red, yellow (top to bottom).

Q140002968.description: A dark green field on the hoist side, separated by a thin white diagonal from a yellow wedge and a blue triangle at the fly; a large white compass star with eight points sits at the center where the colors meet.

Q140002976.description: A red field with a white castle of three crenellated towers centered, the device of the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers; the hoist and fly edges are trimmed with a fringe.

Q140002986.description: Divided vertically: yellow at the hoist bearing a black crowned eagle with red beak and claws, red at the fly bearing a yellow key.

Q140005435.description: Three equal vertical bands of green, white, and green, with the county seal centered on the white band depicting a Native American woman in profile.

Q140033446.description: Thirteen alternating red and white horizontal stripes with a blue canton in the upper hoist. The canton holds thirteen white five-pointed stars in a circle around the white numerals "250".
